title: lithocarpus coinhensis
intro: Lithocarpus coinhensis, also known as the Chinese Bur Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus coinhensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against cardiovascular disease. Lithocarpus coinhensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
